evals.prompt: Remember that Riley's wife Sarah started a new job at Stripe last Monday as a product manager. She was previously at Square.
evals.expected_output: Creates or updates a people entity for Sarah under areas/people/sarah/ with an items.yaml entry containing the new job fact and a superseded entry for the Square job. Updates summary.md accordingly.

assertions.text: items.yaml contains a fact about Sarah starting at Stripe as product manager
If Square fact existed, it is marked status: superseded with superseded_by pointing to the new fact
summary.md is created or updated with the Stripe role prominently mentioned

evals.prompt: Run the weekly synthesis for my memory files. It's been a while since the last one.
evals.expected_output: Executes the weekly synthesis procedure: scans all entities, classifies facts by recency tier, rewrites summaries, archives inactive entities, updates index, and reindexes with qmd.

assertions.text: Reads items.yaml files from entity directories
Rewrites summary.md files based on hot/warm/cold classification
Includes 'Last synthesized' date in updated summaries
Runs qmd index $AGENT_HOME at the end

evals.prompt: What do you know about the ACME contract? I think we discussed it a few weeks ago but I can't remember the details.
evals.expected_output: Uses qmd to search for ACME-related facts across memory files, retrieves relevant entities and daily notes, and presents findings with source references.

assertions.text: Uses qmd query or qmd search to find ACME-related content
Reports findings from entity files and/or daily notes
Updates access_count and last_accessed on any facts retrieved
